en.title: Huangbo Chan Master's Prophecy Poem - Complete 14 Verses with Verification | Full Archive
en.description: The Huangbo Prophecy Poem is a collection of 14 seven-character quatrains attributed to the Tang dynasty Chan Buddhist master Huangbo Xiyun. Using cryptic imagery, it purportedly predicts major events in Chinese history from the Ming dynasty to modern times. Full archive with verification.

structuredData.name: 黄蘖禅师诗
structuredData.description: 托名唐代高僧黄蘖禅师所作的十四首预言诗完整收录与验证

acceptedAnswer.text: 黄蘖禅师诗是一组共十四首的七言预言诗，托名唐代禅宗高僧黄蘖希运所作。诗以隐晦的意象和谐音字谜，预言从明朝灭亡到近现代的中国历史大事。该诗被列为中国古代七大预言之一，但学术界对其真实作者和成书年代存在较大争议，部分学者认为实际成文于清末民初。

mainEntity.name: 黄蘖禅师诗的预言准确吗？

acceptedAnswer.text: 前十一首被认为与明清至民国时期的历史事件有较高吻合度，包括明朝覆灭、康雍乾盛世、太平天国、辛亥革命等。但由于该诗可能成文于清末民初，前期的「准确」可能是事后追述而非真正预言。进入民国后的预言准确度明显下降。

mainEntity.name: What is the Huangbo Prophecy Poem?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Huangbo Prophecy Poem is a collection of 14 seven-character quatrains attributed to the Tang dynasty Chan Buddhist master Huangbo Xiyun (circa 9th century). Using cryptic imagery, homophones, and character puzzles, the poems purportedly predict major events in Chinese history from the fall of the Ming dynasty to modern times. It is listed among China's seven great ancient prophecies, though scholars debate its true authorship and date of composition, with many believing it was actually written in the late Qing or early Republican period.
